blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
